name: private-chat-app
description: Privat, buildelheto 1:1 chat alkalmazas React, Node.js, Socket.IO es SQLite alapon.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build:koyeb: npm run install:all && npm run build
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.ios:add: npm run build && npx cap add ios
